name: Avalanche Summit London 2025
edition: Avalanche Summit London 2025 (the most recent COMPLETED flagship Avalanche Summit; effectively 'Summit IV', following Avalanche Summit III in Buenos Aires, Oct 2024). The next edition, Avalanche Summit New York ('Summit V'), is scheduled for Sept 16-17, 2026.
location: Hatfield House, Hatfield, England (just outside London), UK
dates: May 20-22, 2025 (main summit). Associated events: Owl Explains Crypto Summit policy day May 22; Avalanche Hackathon May 23-25; Codebase incubator Demo Day May 29.
attendance: Over 1,500 in-person attendees (developers, founders, investors, former policymakers); the summit engaged 50+ EMEA partners across DeFi, institutional, and gaming.
defi_themes: DeFi lending protocol architecture (Aave V4 unveiled in a fireside chat by Stani Kulechov)
Institutional adoption of DeFi / institutional liquidity onchain
Scaling DeFi beyond billions in TVL (next-generation lending models)
Layer 1 (L1) infrastructure for building DeFi applications on Avalanche
DeFi regulation and policy (covered in the co-located Owl Explains Crypto Summit presented by Sidley)
Stablecoins and broader onchain finance (discussed as part of the institutional/DeFi track)

notable_panels.title: Fireside chat with Stani Kulechov on Aave V4 and the future of DeFi lending
notable_panels.topic: DeFi / lending: the Aave V4 architectural upgrade for the largest DeFi protocol, how the new model unlocks more for lending protocols, and the changing DeFi landscape (scaling DeFi beyond billions).

notable_panels.title: Owl Explains Crypto Summit presented by Sidley (co-located policy day, May 22)
notable_panels.topic: Blockchain and DeFi regulation; one-day conference for policymakers, academics, and industry experts on the regulatory landscape for DeFi.

notable_speakers.name: Paul Kremsky
notable_speakers.affiliation: Global Head of Business Development, Cumberland

key_takeaways: DeFi lending was a headline DeFi theme: Aave founder Stani Kulechov used the summit to discuss Aave V4, the protocol's new architecture intended to scale DeFi lending beyond its current multi-billion-dollar base.
Institutional adoption of DeFi was a central narrative, with TradFi-adjacent voices (SkyBridge, Cumberland, BitGo, CoinFund) and major crypto VCs (Dragonfly, Crucible) on the agenda.
DeFi regulation/policy was given a dedicated venue via the co-located Owl Explains Crypto Summit (presented by Sidley) on May 22, signaling Avalanche's emphasis on regulatory engagement.
Avalanche positioned its L1 / multi-chain (Avalanche9000) infrastructure as the foundation for building scalable DeFi and institutional finance applications.

The summit reflected a maturation arc from pure on-chain DeFi trading toward institutional liquidity, stablecoins, and onchain finance - a theme Avalanche carried forward into its Summit New York 2026 'Onchain Finance' track.

NOTE on window: No Avalanche flagship Summit fell strictly inside June 2025-June 2026. London Summit (May 20-22, 2025) is the nearest COMPLETED flagship, ~2-4 weeks before the window opened; the next edition, Avalanche Summit New York (Sept 16-17, 2026, Chelsea Industrial, NYC), is ~3 months after the window closed.
